basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Poison Information Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) has published the Poison Information Officer (Allied) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 Poison Information Officer (Allied) positions. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 37 years and holding qualifications such as M.Pharm, M.Sc. (Forensic Nursing), M.Sc. (Phytomedicine), or M.Sc. (Forensic Toxicology) are eligible to apply online through the official BFUHS website. The application process will be active from 11 July 2026 to 31 July 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs. 35,400/- per month

selection_process: Selection will be made on the basis of any forged/false documents produced by the candidate. The candidate must possess the requisite qualification & Experience at the time of walk-in-interview.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download BFUHS Poison Information Officer (Allied) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Poison Information Officer (Allied) Recruitment 2026 - Overview
BFUHS Poison Information Officer (Allied) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BFUHS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BFUHS Poison Information Officer (Allied) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Poison Information Officer (Allied) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
BFUHS Poison Information Officer (Allied) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made on the basis of any forged/false documents produced by the candidate. The candidate must possess the requisite qualification & Experience at the time of walk-in-interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Poison Information Officer (Allied) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BFUHS Poison Information Officer (Allied) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the BFUHS Poison Information Officer (Allied) recruitment is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Poison Information Officer (Allied) post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualifications for the Poison Information Officer (Allied) post are M.Pharm, M.Sc. (Forensic Nursing), M.Sc. (Phytomedicine), or M.Sc. (Forensic Toxicology).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Poison Information Officer (Allied) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Poison Information Officer (Allied) post is 37 years. Specific age relaxations may apply for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Poison Information Officer (Allied) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,400/- per month for the Poison Information Officer (Allied) post.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BFUHS Poison Information Officer (Allied) recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official BFUHS website. After filling the online form, candidates need to submit a hard copy of the application along with self-attested documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for All Categories except SC is Rs. 2360/-, and for SC Category, it is Rs. 1180/-. These fees include GST.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Poison Information Officer (Allied) post is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Baba Farid University of Health Sciences located?
faq.answer: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences is located in Faridkot, Punjab.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is BFU-26/24.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the hard copy of the application?
faq.answer: Self-attested copies of proof of date of birth, marks sheets, degree, experience certificate, residence proof, category certificate (if applicable), and fee receipt proof are required.
